pokemon:xatu.name: Xatu
pokemon:xatu.summary: Xatu is known to stand motionless while staring at the sun all day long. Some people revere it as a mystical Pokémon out of their belief that Xatu is in possession of the power to see into the future.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Xatu is known to stand motionless while staring at the sun all day long. Some people revere it as a mystical Pokémon out of their belief that Xatu is in possession of the power to see into the future.
This odd Pokémon can see both the past and the future. It eyes the sun’s movement all day.
This odd Pokémon can see both the past and the future. It eyes the sun’s movement all day.
Once it begins to meditate at sun­ rise, the entire day will pass before it will move again.
This odd Pokémon can see both the past and the future. It eyes the sun’s movement all day.
It has the enigmatic power of foreseeing the future. Some people in different lands have long believed that XATU are emissaries from another world.
In South America, it is said that its right eye sees the future and its left eye views the past.
They say that it stays still and quiet because it is seeing both the past and future at the same time.
They say that it stays still and quiet because it is seeing both the past and future at the same time.
They say that it stays still and quiet because it is seeing both the past and future at the same time.
Xatu stands rooted and still in one spot all day long. People believe that this Pokémon does so out of fear of the terrible things it has foreseen in the future.
This odd Pokémon can see both the past and the future. It eyes the sun’s movement all day.
This odd Pokémon can see both the past and the future. It eyes the sun’s movement all day.
XATU stands rooted and still in one spot all day long. People believe that this POKéMON does so out of fear of the terrible things it has foreseen in the future.

XATU is known to stand motionless while staring at the sun all day long. Some people revere it as a mystical POKéMON out of their belief that XATU is in possession of the power to see into the future.
This odd Pokémon can see both the past and the future. It eyes the sun’s movement all day.
In South America, it is said that its right eye sees the future and its left eye views the past.
In South America, it is said that its right eye sees the future and its left eye views the past.
They say that it stays still and quiet because it is seeing both the past and future at the same time.
While it can see the future, it has no desire to change it, which is probably why it remains motionless at all times.
It’s said that while this Pokémon has the power to predict the future, it’s not powerful enough to change the future it sees.
This odd Pokémon can see both the past and the future. It eyes the sun’s movement all day.
This odd Pokémon can see both the past and the future. It eyes the sun’s movement all day.
Once it begins to meditate at sunrise, the entire day will pass before it will move again.
They say that it stays still and quiet because it is seeing both the past and future at the same time.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Xatu is known to stand motionless while staring at the sun all day long. Some people revere it as a mystical Pokémon out of their belief that Xatu is in possession of the power to see into the future.

pokemon:natu.name: Natu
pokemon:natu.summary: Natu has a highly developed jumping ability. The Pokémon flaps and leaps onto tree branches that are taller than grown-up people to pick at the tree’s new shoots.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Natu has a highly developed jumping ability. The Pokémon flaps and leaps onto tree branches that are taller than grown-up people to pick at the tree’s new shoots.
It picks food from cactus plants, deftly avoiding buds and spines. It seems to skip about to move.
It picks food from cactus plants, deftly avoiding buds and spines. It seems to skip about to move.
It is extremely good at climbing tree trunks and likes to eat the new sprouts on the trees.
It picks food from cactus plants, deftly avoiding buds and spines. It seems to skip about to move.
It runs up short trees that grow on the savanna to peck at new shoots. A NATU’s eyes look as if they are always observing something.
It usually forages for food on the ground but may, on rare occasions, hop onto branches to peck at shoots.
Because its wings aren't yet fully grown, it has to hop to get around. It is always star­ ing at something.
Because its wings aren’t yet fully grown, it has to hop to get around. It is always staring at something.
Because its wings aren’t yet fully grown, it has to hop to get around. It is always staring at something.
Natu cannot fly because its wings are not yet fully grown. If your eyes meet with this Pokémon’s eyes, it will stare back intently at you. But if you move even slightly, it will hop away to safety.
It picks food from cactus plants, deftly avoiding buds and spines. It seems to skip about to move.
It picks food from cactus plants, deftly avoiding buds and spines. It seems to skip about to move.
NATU cannot fly because its wings are not yet fully grown. If your eyes meet with this POKéMON’s eyes, it will stare back intently at you. But if you move even slightly, it will hop away to safety.
NATU has a highly developed jumping ability. The POKéMON flaps and leaps onto tree branches that are taller than grown-up people to pick at the tree’s new shoots.
Because its wings aren’t yet fully grown, it has to hop to get around. It is always staring at something.
It usually forages for food on the ground but may, on rare occasions, hop onto branches to peck at shoots.
It usually forages for food on the ground but may, on rare occasions, hop onto branches to peck at shoots.
It is extremely good at climbing tree trunks and likes to eat the new sprouts on the trees.
The look in its eyes gives the impression that it’s carefully observing you. If you approach it, Natu will hop away.
Although it still can’t fly, its jumping power is outstanding. It jumps way up into trees and plucks the buds from the branches.
It picks food from cactus plants, deftly avoiding buds and spines. It seems to skip about to move.
It picks food from cactus plants, deftly avoiding buds and spines. It seems to skip about to move.
Because its wings aren’t yet fully grown, it has to hop to get around. It is always staring at something.
It usually forages for food on the ground but may, on rare occasions, hop onto branches to peck at shoots.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Natu has a highly developed jumping ability. The Pokémon flaps and leaps onto tree branches that are taller than grown-up people to pick at the tree’s new shoots.
